chain_of_thought: The letter starts as "a". Alice shifts it: a -> b. Bob does not shift it: stays at b.
The letter starts as "m". Carol shifts it: m -> n. Dan shifts it: n -> o.
The letter starts as "z". Eve shifts it: z wraps around to a. Frank does not shift it: stays at a.
The letter starts as "g". Grace does not shift it: stays at g. Henry does not shift it: stays at g.
The letter starts as "c". Iris shifts it: c -> d. Jack shifts it: d -> e. Kate shifts it: e -> f.
The letter starts as "y". Liam shifts it: y -> z. Mia shifts it: z wraps around to a. Noah does not shift it: stays at a.
